title: SSRF, DNS Rebinding, Injection, Response Validation, and Least Authority · Go Client Systems · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for ssrf, dns rebinding, injection, response validation, and least authority, producing defense-in-depth outbound request policy. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http defense-in-depth outbound request policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Le…
objectives: Allow-list required schemes, ports, hosts, and destinations and enforce network egress limits for server-side fetching. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Address DNS rebinding and validation-to-connect races by binding policy to resolved and connected destinations. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Reject control characters and unsafe dynamic structure in targets and fields and rely on maintained encoders. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Ssrf Destination Policy
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent receives https://127.0.0.1:8005/meta, a decimal IP alias, a hostname that rebinds, and a redirect to file://. Enforce scheme, resolution, connected-address, redirect, response, egress, and privacy defenses. Competency probe: Allow-list required schemes, ports, hosts, and destinations and enforce network egress limits for server-side fetching. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Ssrf Destination Policy trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Ssrf Destination Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for allow-list required schemes, ports, hosts, and destinations and enforce network egress limits for server-side fetching. demonstrate the result through go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, roundtripper, and httptest evidence. For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Ssrf Destination Policy, keep Ssrf Destination Policy connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
